recommendations.title: Cleveland Abduction
recommendations.overview: A single mother becomes Ariel Castro's first kidnapping victim, and finds herself trapped in his home with two other women for 11 years.

recommendations.title: Adulthood
recommendations.overview: After serving six years for killing his schoolmate, a young man learns that someone is out for revenge.

recommendations.title: 24 Hours to Live
recommendations.overview: An assassin seeks redemption after being given a second chance at life.

recommendations.title: Creed III
recommendations.overview: After dominating the boxing world, Adonis Creed has thrived in his career and family life. When a childhood friend and former boxing prodigy, Damian Anderson, resurfaces after serving a long sentence in prison, he is eager to prove that he deserves h

recommendations.title: All Day and a Night
recommendations.overview: While serving life in prison, a young man looks back at the people, the circumstances and the system that set him on the path toward his crime.

recommendations.title: Small Crimes
recommendations.overview: A disgraced former cop, fresh off a six-year prison sentence for attempted murder, returns home looking for redemption but winds up trapped in the mess he left behind.

recommendations.title: American History X
recommendations.overview: Derek Vineyard is paroled after serving 3 years in prison for killing two African-American men. Through his brother, Danny Vineyard's narration, we learn that before going to prison, Derek was a skinhead and the leader of a violent white supremacist

recommendations.title: A Somewhat Gentle Man
recommendations.overview: After serving a 12-year sentence for killing the man that slept with his wife, a man ponders whether he should try and reconcile with his family, or take revenge on those who turned him in.

recommendations.title: Stand Up Guys
recommendations.overview: After serving 28 years in prison for accidentally killing the son of a crime boss, newly paroled gangster Val reunites with his former partners in crime, Doc and Hirsch, for a night on the town. As the three men revisit old haunts, reflect on their g

recommendations.title: Making a Living
recommendations.overview: A swindler scams a newspaper reporter-photographer and then, not realizing where the man is employed, applies for a job at his newspaper.
